items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, 1 critical
items.summary: Amasty released a massive security update for 25 extensions, including one critical vulnerability that could lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, which could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, gain unauthorized access to store data, and compromise customer accounts.
